scenario: RDBMS outage cascading to MCP failure
description: Simulates a primary database going down, causing MCP hosts to fail as they lose their data source

signal.message: Connection pool exhausted - max connections reached
Write timeout after 30s - disk I/O saturation
Cannot reach data source - RDBMS_PRIMARY unresponsive
Failover attempted - secondary RDBMS also unreachable
Cache invalidation storm triggered by RDBMS failure
